meaning: n.[生化]促甲状腺素,甲状腺刺激激素
examples: Thyrotropin Releasing Hormone; free acid; TRH; free acid.
Objective To study the clinicopathological features of thyrotropin-secreting pituitary adenoma (TSH adenoma).
Objective To study the expression of extra-thyroidal thyrotropin (TSH) receptors (TSHR) in human osteoblasts (hOB).
Within a year Fujino was producing kilograms of LHRH and TRH (thyrotropin-releasing hormone) with crystal purity.
